testsuite.name: agentforge.gateway.GatewayRoutesTest

testcase.name: cancelWorkflow with unknown ID returns false
getWorkflow with unknown ID returns empty
executeWorkflow runs and returns completed results
submitWorkflow returns accepted response with workflow ID

testsuite.system-out: 08:31:27.089 [Test worker] WARN agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow rejected: cyclic: Workflow DAG contains a cycle 08:31:27.091 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow submitted: 7eefa261-e9f1-43f9-8c2d-abe2eb9bc32f (status-wf) 08:31:27.092 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow submitted: 7f50dcc2-a226-40fa-96be-30b7cd85860a (cancel-wf) 08:31:27.092 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow cancelled: 7f50dcc2-a226-40fa-96be-30b7cd85860a 08:31:27.093 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow submitted: d536c149-84bc-43b3-9bf0-878f4eed0b28 (wf-1) 08:31:27.093 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow submitted: 0d8d7a3f-7df9-4546-bf68-2987701b127e (wf-2) 08:31:27.096 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow submitted: 861527a4-30c2-463d-9432-2ae0220d56bb (exec-wf) 08:31:27.097 [] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow completed: 861527a4-30c2-463d-9432-2ae0220d56bb (2 tasks) 08:31:27.098 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow submitted: aa3f02e6-274a-458f-b515-8c0077a1f358 (test-wf)
